mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket (user_id, related_source_id, created_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{relatedSourceId}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, related_source_id AS relatedSourceId, status, last_reply_at AS lastReplyAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM ticket WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, related_source_id AS relatedSourceId, status, last_reply_at AS lastReplyAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM ticket WHERE deleted=0 AND status=#{status} ORDER BY last_reply_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET status=#{status}, last_reply_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE ticket SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
